classes.name: Class 0 — No Secret
classes.description: Fake values, placeholders, sample IDs. Safe for docs and examples.
rules: Must be obviously fake or placeholder-marked.

classes.name: Class 1 — Local Developer Secret
classes.description: Local-only test secret on Blake's local/private machine.
rules: Never placed in a reusable snapshot.

classes.name: Class 2 — Pilot Deployment Secret
classes.description: Secrets for a specific pilot deployment.
allowed_locations: pilot-specific VPS or private deployment machine only
rules: Never in reusable snapshots or zip artifacts.
Rotation must be documented with a key rotation record.

classes.name: Class 3 — Restricted Production Secret
classes.description: High-risk secret requiring the highest care and Blake approval.
examples: payment or billing credential if ever added
allowed_locations: approved production deployment machine only, with Blake approval
rules: Requires Blake approval to create, place, or rotate.
Never in GitHub, snapshots, zips, or logs.
Rotation requires a key rotation record and Blake sign-off.
